prompt: I need to run Burn inference in a WebAssembly browser app (no GPU, pure CPU). Which backend should I use? Also, tell me what Cargo.toml features I need and how to load model weights from a compiled-in bytes slice so I don't hit the filesystem at runtime. My model is already trained and saved as a .bpk file.
assertions: Cargo features: flex, store, default-features = false
Uses include_bytes! to embed model weights at compile time
